omitted_declarations.policy_reference: User Content License Grant. In connection with your use of the Services, you may be able to post, upload, or submit content to be made available through the Services ("User Content"). By using the Service and uploading User Content, you grant us a license to access, use, host, cache, store, reproduce, transmit, display, publish, distribute, and modify User Content and any associated names, images, voices, personas and likenesses, in any and all media now known or hereafter devised throughout the world as reasonably necessary for operation of our Services; provided, however that we will not display your User Content outside of the Services without your consent. You agree that these rights and licenses are royalty free, transferable, sub-licensable, worldwide and irrevocable, and include a right for us to permit access to or disclose User Content to third parties if we determine such access is necessary to comply with our legal obligations. Additionally, you grant each applicable Event Host a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, fully sub-licensable sub-license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, and display associated Event Content, in any and all media now known or hereafter devised throughout the world. As part of the foregoing license grants, you agree that the other users of the Services shall have the right to comment on and/or tag User Content and/or to use, publish, display, modify or include a copy of User Content as part of their own use of the Services. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, the Company reserves the right, and has absolute discretion, to remove, screen, edit, or delete any of User Content at any time, for any reason, and without notice. By posting or submitting User Content through the Services, you represent and warrant that you have, or have obtained, all rights, licenses, consents, permissions, power and/or authority necessary to grant the rights granted herein for User Content. You agree that User Content will not contain material subject to copyright or other proprietary rights, unless you have the necessary permission or are otherwise legally entitled to post the material and to grant us the license described above.
